text.title: AIO Presence Tracker Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the per-query snapshot, the weekly aggregate, and the KPI definitions.

list.item: geo (ISO country code or `world` for non-geo)
queries..our_snippet_selected (bool; true iff snippet text matches our page within tolerance)
control_pass_rate (float; required for snapshot to be `trusted`)
kpi.our_domain_cited_rate (per query, computed across the 7 daily snapshots)
trend_delta_4w: per-query KPI delta vs 4-week rolling baseline
untrusted_days: count of days flagged untrusted
our_snippet_selected = true when AIO snippet text matches our page H2 / definition / table cell within 90% fuzzy match.
our_panel_position = ordinal position of our citation in the panel's source list (1 = first).

antipattern.description: Weekly aggregate computed from `untrusted` snapshots without flag.
antipattern.reason: r1 violation. Aggregate computed on bad data misleads decisions.
Timestamp is required for trend ordering.

antipattern.description: queries object reports only aio_present without panel_citations / our_panel_position.
antipattern.reason: r3 violation. Position + snippet are required for diagnosis.

list.item: Weekly aggregate excludes untrusted days from the kpi rollup OR notes the inclusion.
Primary KPI displayed prominently in the weekly report; not buried.
